attacking_style: Attacks from breakaways in the final 2km on rolling or false-flat terrain, exploiting subtle gradients rather than steep climbs. Prefers late, decisive accelerations when already in advantageous position.
team_tactics: Limited team support visible; operates primarily from established breakaways rather than team-led setups. Self-reliant tactics requiring early positioning in moves.
terrain_preference: Rolling false-flat finishes and subtle gradients where power can be sustained. Exposed on steep, punchy climbs where pure climbers can accelerate explosively in final meters.
vulnerability: Cannot match explosive accelerations of pure climbers on steep gradients in final 100-200 meters, even when well-positioned. Struggles to follow sharp attacks on steep finishes.
key_patterns: Executes winning moves inside final 2km from breakaways on rolling terrain (2 observations)
Performs better on false-flat/subtle gradients than steep climbs (2 observations)
Shows late-race strength after positioning in breakaways rather than attacking from peloton (2 observations)
Vulnerable to pure climbers' accelerations on steep finishes despite good positioning (1 observation)
form_trajectory: positive: recovered from Tour illness to win from breakaway at 2018 Vuelta, showing improved strength on rolling terrain
